sp_widget.name: Tasker States Progress Bar
sp_widget.template:
{{data.nWaiting}}% Waiting
{{data.nUnassigned}}% Unassigned
{{data.nAssigned}}% Assigned
{{data.nAccepted}}% Accepted
{{data.nRejected}}% Rejected
{{data.nWorkScheduled}}% Scheduled
{{data.nInProgress}}% In Progress
{{data.nInReview}}% In Review
{{data.nRework}}% Rework
{{data.nCompleted}}% Completed
{{data.nCanceled}}% Canceled
{{data.nIncompleted}}% Incompleted
${This Task has no Subtasks}
